author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Vinehall Mitra Event 2 - Follow up Questions at Padmaloka 1981
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR
1981 QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS
FOLLOW UP TO VINEHALL HELD AT PADMALOKA
(VINEHALL 2)

CONTENTS



1-2 The Three Wisdoms (Prajnas or Pannas) - Suttam aya, Cintamaya and Bhavanamaya
2 Is Bhante a male chauvinist person?
3-7 Use of emotive terms i.e. sexist, racist, irra tional
The biological conditioning of women (or is it soci al conditioning?)
7 "The Buddha was a man as we are men" a line in t he short/basic puja
8 Metrification as an unnecessary thing in Britain
Blake's "Urizenic Reasoning"
9 Men standing up for women
10 How the FWBO give women respect and considerati on as women
The history of single-sex activities within the FWB O
11-13 Motherhood and the spiritual life
12-13 Fatherhood
13-14 Does the father need to live with the mother of his child?
13-14 Having small children in women's communitie s
13-20 The role of the biological father, if any.
15-17 Bhante's critique of the nuclear family
17 Creating an alternative society
18 The FWBO giving women a better situation than a nywhere else
21 Bhante's trying to form a mixed community with no success
22 Replacing neurotic dependence with kalyana mitr ata
24 The undesirability of 'unisex' trends
24-25 FWBO co-operatives and distribution of dana (donations)
26 The structures of FWBO Co-operatives and their aims and objectives
26-27 Supporting co-op workers - 'wages'
27-28 Being motivated by the ideal rather than by money or force
29 The controversial ideas of the FWBO Giving the FWBO the benefit of the doubt
30-36 Communication exercises and their history
36-38 Terminology - 'retreats', 'events' etc
38-39 Worthwhile aspects of Christianity?
39 Christianity and guilt
40-42 Dreams and significant dreams
42 Jung's theories of the unconscious
43 Manipulating dreams
44-47 Developing a stronger sense of feeling in th e Mett
ā Bhāvanā meditation practice
46 How much meditation do people need to do?
47-48 Being careful immediately after meditating
